name: Jon Richardson
blurb: He earned a Best Newcomer nomination at the 2007 Edinburgh Comedy Awards for Spatula Pad and won the Chortle Best Breakthrough Act award in 2008.
bio: Jon Richardson is an English comedian from Lancaster known for precise observational stand-up about anxiety, pedantry and domestic routine. He earned a Best Newcomer nomination at the 2007 Edinburgh Comedy Awards for Spatula Pad and won the Chortle Best Breakthrough Act award in 2008. He is a regular on panel shows and has toured several stand-up shows, including Nidiot and Old Man.

timeline.ev: Wins his heat of the BBC New Talent Comedy Search
Best Newcomer nomination for Spatula Pad
Old Man tour across the UK

accolades: Edinburgh Comedy Award Best Newcomer nomination, Spatula Pad (2007)
Chortle Award for Best Breakthrough Act (2008)

bits.yt_title: Jon Richardson's Passive-Aggressive Recycling Training | Live at the Apollo | BBC Comedy Greats
